nodes.title: Understanding Demo Fundamentals
nodes.description: Learn what a demo is, its purpose in product development, and why demos matter for stakeholder communication.

nodes.title: Identifying Your Demo Audience
nodes.description: Understand different audience types (executives, technical teams, end-users) and how to tailor messaging accordingly.

nodes.title: Planning Demo Structure
nodes.description: Learn to organize demos with clear flow: introduction, problem statement, solution walkthrough, and call-to-action.

nodes.title: Technical Setup and Tools
nodes.description: Master the tools and environment needed for smooth demo delivery, including backup plans and technical troubleshooting.

nodes.title: Effective Storytelling in Demos
nodes.description: Learn narrative techniques to engage audiences through compelling stories that highlight product value and user benefits.

nodes.title: Delivering Live Demos
nodes.description: Develop skills for real-time demo execution including pacing, handling interruptions, and maintaining audience engagement.

nodes.title: Managing Questions and Objections
nodes.description: Learn techniques to address audience concerns, unexpected questions, and objections while maintaining demo momentum.

nodes.title: Measuring Demo Effectiveness
nodes.description: Understand how to collect feedback, track demo metrics, and iterate based on audience response and conversion data.

nodes.title: Advanced Demo Customization
nodes.description: Master creating tailored demos for different scenarios, A/B testing variations, and optimizing conversion funnels.
